name: John pradeepraj
profile_summary: AI Engineer and Full Stack Developer with 2+ years of experience delivering production ready applications. Expertise in leveraging AI and automation to improve process efficiency. Proficient in Python, Next.js, React.js, and FastAPI for building scalable data solutions.
technical_skills: Programming - TypeScript, Python, JavaScript, Java, C, C++
Frontend Development - React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Vite, shadcn/ui, Responsive UI design
Backend Development - Node.js, Express.js, Flask, REST API design, JWT Authentication
AI / LLM Engineering - OpenRouter APIs, RAG, LangChain, Grounding, Scikit-learn, PyTorch
Data & Storage - Supabase, MySQL, Vector Databases (Chroma)
DevOps & Tools - Git, Postman, Vercel, Firebase, Puppeteer, Cheerio, N8N

experience.description: Leading development of an AI-powered platform that converts vague client design ideas into clear, designer-ready briefs.
Built an inventory demand prediction system using SQL Server, Flask, XGBoost, SVM, and regression models.
Grew Perplexity AI's presence at VIT Vellore through events, workshops, and student community initiatives.

project1_title: Inventory Management System with QR Code Tracking
project1_points: Built a SaaS platform using React (Vite.js) with ShadCN UI and Tailwind CSS for a responsive and modern interface.
Integrated 70+ APIs to enable QR-based stock tracking, POS operations, and real-time low-stock alerts.
Designed an employee scheduling system with a Google Calendar-style UI for managing availability and shifts.
Implemented secure authentication using Firebase and JWT for role-based access control.
Integrated Gemini Flash 2.0 API for a context-aware AI assistant and applied SARIMAX in Django for intelligent sales and order forecasting.
project2_title: AI-Powered Marketplace for Designers and Founders
project2_points: Developed an AI-powered conversational assistant to automate merchandise brief creation through intelligent founder interviews.
Integrated LLMs (GPT-4o-mini via OpenRouter API) for context-aware interactions and structured output generation.
Built a responsive web application using Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS with modern UI components and animations.
Implemented backend services using Firebase and Cloudinary for data management and file handling.
project3_points: Developed a full-stack RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) system using Next.js (frontend) and FastAPI (backend) with a modular architecture.
Implemented secure authentication and role-based access control (Admin/Student) using JWT and SQLite for user management.
Designed a context-aware AI chat system integrating OpenRouter LLM to answer queries based on uploaded knowledge.
Developed a responsive, dark-themed chat UI with seamless interaction between frontend and backend services.
Ensured persistent storage and efficient retrieval using ChromaDB, maintaining knowledge across server restarts.
project4_points: Designed and developed a multi-layer forensic image analysis system to detect deepfakes images.
Combined AI-based detection with traditional forensic techniques, including Frequency Domain Analysis (FFT), Error Level Analysis (ELA), and EXIF metadata inspection.
Built a decision pipeline leveraging an open-source Hugging Face model and an OpenRouter VLM to classify images as AI-generated, edited, or authentic.
Developed a full-stack solution using Next.js (frontend) and FastAPI (backend) with SQLite DB.
achievements: Winner, Yukta 26 Hackathon (National Level) – ₹10,000 prize, Top 1 among 250+ teams
Winner, Aicon at Sairam Engineering College (National Level) – ₹10,000 prize, out of 100+ teams
Winner, Codeathon 2.0 – ₹10,000 prize, ranked 1st among 50+ colleges
Winner, Park College Codeathon – ₹1,500 prize, from 600+ participants
volunteer_experience: Senior core member at THE AI/ML CLUB VIT Vellore

education.degree: M.Tech Integrated in Software Engineering, VIT Vellore
